prestazioni: D15B 1.5L SOHC VTEC-E engine swap to a D16A9 (1.6L DOHC non-VTEC) from the Honda Civic EG6, paired with a custom-tuned Hondata S300 ECU to optimize fuel maps for 98 RON fuel and a 10.5:1 compression ratio via forged Wiseco pistons (81mm bore) and Eagle H-beam connecting rods

Garrett GT2560R turbocharger with a custom 0.63 A/R turbine housing, mated to a GReddy Type-S intercooler (320mm x 180mm x 60mm core) and a Tomei 60mm titanium blow-off valve, supported by a custom 3-inch stainless steel exhaust system with a Fujitsubo Giken AX25 muffler for backpressure optimization

Full chassis reinforcement via a Buddy Club Racing Spec roll cage (JDM-spec, 2.5mm wall thickness) and a custom subframe brace from Spoon Sports, paired with Ohlins DFV Road & Track coilovers (custom valving for the Logo's 2,370mm wheelbase) and Endless CC-R brake pads with DBA 4000 Series rotors (256mm front, 220mm rear)
estetica: Rocket Bunny V1 aero kit (Logo-specific, with a 3-piece front splitter, overfenders, and a duckbill rear wing) in a custom matte 'Honda Phoenix Yellow' (R-51) wrap with gloss black accents, paired with Work Meister S1 3P 15x7 +38 wheels (185/55R15 Yokohama Advan Neova AD08R tires)

Recaro SRD-II seats (JDM-spec, reclining mechanism removed) with custom Bride Euroster II seat rails, wrapped in Alcantera with 'Logo TS' embroidery in red stitching, paired with a Nardi Classic 350mm steering wheel and a custom MOMO shift knob (D15B gearbox pattern)

Full JDM-spec lighting conversion: Cibie Oscar MX1 headlights (H4 bulb conversion), Depo JDM-style taillights (clear lens with smoked reflectors), and a custom LED bar in the front grille (Osram LEDriving LG 600, 6000K color temperature) with a custom wiring harness from Wire Works Racing
